report.summary: Community growth cycle v9: FOMC T-1 decision-day content pack — 5 live-reaction tweet templates (pre-decision, countdown, hawkish/dovish/thread), full newsletter draft (Thu Mar 19), Discord/Telegram announcement copy, Sprint 59 feature poll, weekend evergreen posts; FOMC decision-day social card created with 3 scenario panels (dovish $80-85K / hawkish $65-70K / base case $72-77K).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet A (Mar 18 8am ET): Pre-decision dot plot primer — what's priced in vs not, dovish/hawkish BTC scenarios, link to FOMC guide
Tweet B (Mar 18 1:30pm): 30-min countdown tweet — rates, dot plot scenarios, Fear & Greed context (was 5 in Feb, ~35 today)
Tweet C (hawkish template): Post-decision response if dot plot removes cuts — short-term correction framing with bullish long-term structure
Tweet D (dovish template): Post-decision response if cuts added — $80K next resistance, dollar/liquidity mechanism explained
Tweet E (FOMC thread, 5 posts): Educational breakdown — what the Fed just did, dot plot explained, historical BTC reaction, what to watch next (Pectra Apr 10, tax Apr 15, Powell exit May 23)

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19 FOMC Reaction Edition): 3 subject lines A/B/C tested; Market Pulse (BTC $75K, ETF streak, F&G), New on degen0x (FOMC guide, Hyperliquid guide, 8 crypto card reviews), Worth Reading (tax guide, Pectra guide), Degen Corner (Strategy 738K BTC + Sprint 59 poll)
Discord/Telegram: FOMC decision-day announcement with prediction poll, post-decision community engagement template, 29-day tax deadline pinned reminder
Sprint 59 poll (Twitter/Discord): 4 options — Options Chain Viewer, Whale Wallet Tracker, Pectra Countdown, DeFi Yield Aggregator
Weekend evergreen: Saturday F&G accumulation-vs-euphoria post (Fear & Greed tool), Sunday DeFi Sunday (Aave V4 teaser + defi-yields tool)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-decision-day-2026.svg — 1200x630 SVG social card: LEFT column (FOMC Decision Day branding, BTC $75K pill, F&G 35/100 pill, ETF $962.8M pill, guide URL); RIGHT column (3 scenario panels — DOVISH $80-85K green / HAWKISH $65-70K red / BASE CASE $72-77K indigo, each with price target + macro mechanism explanation); degen0x logo + branding; signature brand gradient top bar; dark glass-morphism surfaces. Saved to /public/social-fomc-decision-day-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context (7-Day Lookback)
items: Site: 398 published pages — up ~64 pages in the past 7 days. Largest single-week publish acceleration to date.
Content pipeline highlights: FOMC guide, Hyperliquid trading guide, Telegram bots guide, 8 crypto card reviews — all published this week.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items remaining (Bitcoin Runes + Farcaster SocialFi). Near-zero backlog is a strategic win — production nearly caught up with content creation.
Key catalysts this week: BTC $75K breakout (+25% from Feb bottom), $540M short liquidations, 6-day ETF inflow streak ($962.8M). FOMC T-1 is the immediate driver.
Upcoming catalysts: FOMC Mar 18 (tomorrow), Tax deadline Apr 15 (T-29), Ethereum Pectra Apr 10 (T-24). Full 3-catalyst window over next 30 days.
GSC organic signals: Day 18 of 14-21 window. First organic impressions and clicks expected to be arriving this week as early batches index.
Critical blocker: git lock (~27hr stale) + Vercel trial (~2 days). 533 uncommitted files of content, including all this week's guides, remain undeployed. Deploy unblocking is P0.
